name: Ranger
description: A wilderness hunter who strikes from range and reads the land. Rangers track quarry across rooms and land a powerful aimed shot, later training second wind to keep going on long hunts and, at level 15, a crippling shot that hobbles a foe's aim and attacks, then at level 30 a volley that rains arrows on every enemy in the room at once, and at level 45 a hunter's mark that brands a foe and lays their defences bare for the whole party, then at level 60 evasive maneuvers, a personal defensive footwork that lets them slip and roll clear of incoming blows, and at level 75 a pinning shot, the ranger's first true control tool: a called shot that nails a single foe to the ground and roots them in place, then at level 85 a serpent sting, the ranger's first damage-over-time: a venom-tipped arrow whose poison courses through a foe and burns them for moments after the shot; the fastest class afoot, the ranger trades a rogue's burst and toughness for unmatched mobility and reach.
